# INTRX — The Interaction Library

> A curated, copy-paste library of the web interactions used by award-winning
> design agencies. 288 hand-built patterns live today. The original roadmap is complete; 39 likes-driven expansion patterns are queued.
> Each pattern ships three things: a live demo, a single-file HTML+CSS+JS
> snippet, and an LLM prompt that specifies the interaction precisely enough
> to rebuild it in any framework.

Site: https://tanzir71.github.io/interaction/
Vercel mirror: https://intrx.vercel.app/
Repo: https://github.com/tanzir71/interaction
License: MIT. Free for commercial use. No tracking, fully static.

## What an agent can do with this library

1. REUSE A PATTERN AS-IS: every card's "Code" tab is a self-contained snippet —
   HTML + scoped CSS + JS that receives `root` (the pattern's root element).
   Dependencies, when any, are GSAP / ScrollTrigger / Lenis via CDN, declared
   per pattern.
2. REBUILD IN ANY STACK: every card's "LLM Prompt" tab is a full spec —
   easings, timings, math, accessibility notes. Paste it into a model with
   "implement this as a React component" (or Vue/Svelte/etc.).
3. ADD A NEW PATTERN: register one object in a `js/demos.*.js` file:
   { id, title, cat, rootClass, tags, libs, desc, seen, hint, html, css, js, prompt }
   Root class must be a unique `d-*` prefix; JS receives (root, stage); demos
   must be self-contained, 320px tall, and respect prefers-reduced-motion.

## Live categories (288 patterns)

Scroll (22): lenis-smooth-scroll, scroll-reveal-stagger, parallax-layers,
horizontal-scroll, sticky-stack, scroll-progress, velocity-skew, scroll-zoom, scroll-text-highlight, scroll-image-sequence, scroll-svg-draw, scroll-rotate-gallery, scroll-split-screen, scroll-marquee-direction, scroll-counter-rotate, scroll-depth-tunnel, scroll-letter-scatter, scroll-color-theme, scroll-clip-morph, scroll-table-of-contents, scroll-inertia-grid, scroll-video-scrubber
Cursor (25): cursor-gooey-blob, cursor-particle-emitter, cursor-elastic-line, cursor-inverted-lens, cursor-text-repel, cursor-grid-ripple, cursor-hover-preview, cursor-drag-ghost, cursor-eyes-follow, cursor-liquid-metaball, cursor-rope-trail, cursor-velocity-stretch, cursor-snap-targets, cursor-flashlight-noise, cursor-emoji-rain, cursor-magnetic-grid-lines, cursor-heat-shimmer, cursor-crosshair-hud, cursor-pull-distort, cursor-shadow-parallax, custom-cursor, magnetic-button, image-trail, spotlight-mask, tilt-card
Text & Type (23): split-text-reveal, text-scramble, kinetic-marquee,
line-mask-reveal, letter-roll, proximity-type, stat-counter, text-wave-hover, text-clip-image, text-typewriter-caret, text-falling-letters, text-blur-focus, text-strike-reveal, text-anagram-shuffle, text-outline-fill-scroll, text-ransom-note, text-glitch-layers, text-circular-spin, text-accordion-squeeze, text-underline-magic, text-numbers-slot, text-highlighter-swipe, text-broken-grid
Image & WebGL (20): webgl-distortion, particle-dissolve, clip-reveal,
hover-zoom-card, pixelate-reveal, grayscale-grid, webgl-ripple-click, webgl-pixel-river, webgl-fisheye-hover, webgl-static-tv, webgl-kaleidoscope, webgl-vertex-wave, image-slice-hover, image-infinite-zoom, comparison-slider, kenburns-crossfade, image-duotone-swap, image-shatter-click, image-blinds-reveal, image-magnetic-tiles
SVG & Line (10): svg-path-draw-hover, svg-blob-morph, svg-squiggle-underline, svg-line-graph-live, svg-marching-ants, svg-signature-write, svg-gooey-menu, svg-topographic-drift, svg-circuit-pulse, svg-lissajous-loader
3D & Perspective (10): css3d-cube-nav, css3d-card-flip-grid, css3d-book-page, css3d-carousel-cylinder, css3d-parallax-room, css3d-isometric-hover, css3d-folding-map, webgl-point-globe, webgl-wobbly-sphere, css3d-depth-hero
Physics (10): spring-cursor-follower, pendulum-tags, chain-links, gravity-drop-icons, collision-bubbles, soft-body-blob, cloth-flag, wrecking-ball-text, inertia-window-drag, magnet-snap-grid
Liquid & Organic (8): liquid-blob-buttons, ferrofluid-dots, water-ripple-2d, lava-lamp, ink-bleed-reveal, melt-drip-text, smoke-wisps, bubble-float-pop
Galleries & Sliders (12): slider-elastic-edges, slider-progress-fraction, slider-clip-transition, slider-stack-deck, slider-fullbleed-parallax, gallery-filmstrip-scrub, gallery-expanding-columns, gallery-honeycomb, gallery-random-stack, gallery-dual-row-drift, lightbox-flip-zoom, slider-wheel-3d
Navigation & Menus (12): menu-fullscreen-overlay, menu-split-reveal, menu-circular-expand, nav-blur-elevate, nav-hide-reveal, nav-active-pill, menu-letter-cascade, menu-image-peek, breadcrumb-collapse, tab-morph-content, sidebar-rail-expand, burger-morph-x
Buttons & Micro (14): btn-border-beam, btn-shimmer-sweep, btn-text-slide-swap, btn-icon-hop, btn-success-morph, btn-confetti-burst, btn-ripple-material, btn-jelly-press, like-heart-particles, checkbox-draw-check, toggle-day-night, copy-inline-feedback, hover-tooltip-spring, badge-notification-pop
Forms & Inputs (10): input-float-label, input-underline-grow, input-shake-error, input-char-counter-arc, otp-code-boxes, password-strength-bar, select-morph-dropdown, range-elastic-thumb, textarea-auto-grow, form-multistep-progress
Loaders & Progress (10): preloader-percentage, preloader-word-cycle, loader-dots-wave, loader-morph-shapes, loader-typing-code, skeleton-shimmer, progress-blob-fill, loader-orbit-dots, upload-progress-morph, page-load-counter-slide
Data & Numbers (6): chart-bars-race, chart-donut-sweep, sparkline-hover-scrub, heatmap-fade-in, ticker-tape-prices, radar-sweep-blips
FUI & Terminal (10): fui-status-dashboard, fui-target-lock, fui-terminal-boot, fui-waveform-scope, fui-signal-scanner, fui-data-stream, fui-access-granted, fui-hex-dump, fui-trading-terminal, fui-orbital-tracker
Ambient (10): particles-constellation, gradient-mesh-drift, flow-field, starfield-warp, conway-life-fade, audio-reactive-bars, matrix-rain, fireflies-night, aurora-curtains, rain-window
Sound & Haptics (6): ui-sound-kit, typing-mechanical, theremin-pad, notification-chime-stack, drum-grid-sequencer, scroll-pitch-drone
Play & Easter Eggs (8): dvd-screensaver, konami-unlock, click-fireworks, drag-to-break, pet-the-blob, gravity-flip-page, wobbly-window-drag, snake-in-grid
Raster & Glitch (25): dither-bayer, dither-floyd-steinberg, dither-blue-noise, halftone-dots, halftone-lines, ascii-render, ascii-webcam-style-wave, glitch-rgb-slices, glitch-datamosh-blocks, scanline-crt, vhs-tracking, pixel-sort, noise-grain-overlay, threshold-mosaic-transition, bitmap-font-marquee, interlace-flicker, posterize-hover, chromatic-type, ascii-donut-3d, ascii-fire, ascii-fluid-stir, ascii-portrait-reveal, ascii-morph, ascii-type-explode, terminal-window
Skeuomorph (16): neumorphic-buttons, mechanical-switch, rotary-knob, brushed-metal-slider, paper-stack-cards, glass-refraction-card, led-segment-display, flip-clock, embossed-press, analog-gauge, punch-card-keyboard, cassette-reels, slot-machine-reel, zippo-flame, torn-paper-edge, wax-seal-stamp
Layout & UI (21): mac-window, dock-magnify, flip-expand, smooth-accordion,
spring-modal, drag-carousel, hover-fill-button, page-transition, logo-marquee, bottom-sheet, radial-menu, elastic-tabs, masonry-filter, command-palette, toast-stack, number-input-drag, context-menu-custom, resizable-split-pane, card-hover-border-gradient, list-reorder-drag, zoom-ui-inception

## Roadmap

39 expansion patterns remain. The original CODEX_HANDOFF.md roadmap is complete;
the active likes-driven batch is specified in CODEX_HANDOFF_2.md. Unpublished
items are listed on the site as a roadmap — only hand-built, working demos are cards.

## House style for contributed demos

Colors: #0a0a0b bg, #161619 raised, #2e2e34 lines, #ececef text, #a78bfa accent.
Fonts: JetBrains Mono throughout. Transitions: cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1).
Keep one rAF loop, passive listeners, transform/opacity animation only,
visible keyboard focus, and a static representative state under
prefers-reduced-motion.
